name: Baked Stuffed Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 2 Bread slices, soaked in water and squeezed dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cut zucchini lengthwise and remove pulp, leaving shells about 1/4 inch thick. Chop the flesh.
3. In a bowl, combine onion, garlic, cheese, meat, rice, bread, eggs, salt, pepper, oregano, and zucchini. Mix well.
4. Stuff each zucchini half with the mixture. Place in greased baking dish and cover.
5. Bake for 40 minutes.
6. Place a slice of mozzarella on each half and bake, uncovered, an additional 10 minutes.
7. Serve hot.
